## Breaking Change

<!-- Required if
  If a Pull Request `title` uses "!"
  (ex: "feat!: some breaking change"):
  then "BREAKING CHANGE: <description>" must be included
  in the footer (last line) of the Pull Request `body`.
-->

BREAKING CHANGE:

<!-- Delete this & all below before merging -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` - New feature
- [ ] `fix` - Bug fix
- [ ] `test` - Tests
- [ ] `tool` - Tooling
- [ ] `refactor` - Preventative
- [ ] `chore` - Maintenance
- [ ] `docs` - Documentation
- [ ] `style` - Formatting
- [ ] Breaking change (`!`)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have added tests if needed
- [ ] The code passes tests, linting, type & formatting checks
- [ ] If I made a decision, I have documented it in an ADR
